headline: A Look At Stanley Black & Decker (SWK) Valuation After Recent Share Price Movements
summary: Stanley Black & Decker (SWK) is back in focus after recent share price moves, with the stock closing at US$78.17. That puts its market value near US$12.3b and draws attention to how investors are currently pricing its tool and industrial businesses. See our latest analysis for Stanley Black & Decker. Recent trading shows mixed momentum, with the share price slipping 1.57% over the last day and 4.24% over 90 days. In contrast, the year to date share price return of 2.22% compares with a 1 year...
